title: Amtech E2556 Diamond Sharpening File for Scissors, Knives and Garden Tools, 2-Sided Flat and Curved
features: The Amtech 2-sided diamond sharpening file is ideal for sharpening a wide variety of items, such as scissors, knives and garden tools.
This diamond file for sharpening has a tapered blade which is flat on one side and half-round on the other side.
The diamond file essentially has two grades, which are 240 (curved side) and 400 (flat side).
Features a comfortable soft grip to make handling easier, especially when used as a garden tool sharpener.
Approximate size of the knife sharpener is 10” (250mm).
description: From the manufacturer About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
